title: delissea holophylla var. obovata
intro: Delissea holophylla var. obovata, also known as the false holly or ma'o hau hele, is a rare, endemic plant species found in Hawaii. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for wound healing and skin issues. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating colds, and alleviating digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Delissea holophylla var. obovata is often used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, although its use should be carefully monitored due to limited scientific research and potential side effects.
